mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiry_tb (inquiry_id, member_id, title, content, status) VALUES (inquiry_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{title}, #{content}, '대기중')
mapper.select: SELECT i.*, m.login_id, m.name FROM inquiry_tb i JOIN member_tb m ON i.member_id = m.member_id WHERE i.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY i.created_at DESC
SELECT i.*, m.login_id, m.name FROM inquiry_tb i JOIN member_tb m ON i.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY i.created_at DESC
